home.title: Andrea Palacio | Commercial & Editorial Photography · Monterrey · Houston
home.description: Elevated visual storytelling for brands that demand more. Commercial & editorial photographer specializing in hospitality, restaurants, real estate, and brand campaigns in Monterrey and Houston.

blog.title: Journal | Andrea Palacio Photography
blog.description: Explore Andrea Palacio's journal on hospitality, restaurant, real estate, and brand photography, with editorial insights crafted for ambitious brands in Monterrey, Houston, and beyond.

hero.headline:
Elevated Visual
Storytelling
hero.subheadline: Bringing magazine-quality aesthetics to hospitality, real estate, and lifestyle brands across Monterrey & Houston.

services.label: What I Offer
services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Premium visual content that elevates your brand and drives results.

editorial.title: Editorial & Fashion
editorial.desc: High-end editorial portraits, fashion lookbooks, and beauty campaigns that command attention.

hospitality.title: Boutique Hospitality
hospitality.desc: Moving beyond standard room shots. We capture the curated atmosphere, the luxury details, and the genuine lifestyle experience that compels guests to book.

food.title: Culinary Experiences
food.desc: Capturing the heat of the kitchen and the ambiance of the dining room. We style food and spaces with an artistic, editorial eye that makes menus irresistible.

realestate.title: Architectural Aesthetics
realestate.desc: Using fashion-inspired lighting and mood to transform real estate into aspirational living spaces. Perfect for luxury developments in San Pedro and exclusive Houston neighborhoods.

brand.title: Brand Campaigns
brand.desc: Leveraging years of fashion photography experience to cast your product in a highly polished, narrative-driven campaign designed to convert.

content.title: Content Creation
content.desc: Social-media-ready visual packages combining photography with strategic storytelling.

about.label: About
about.title: Your Brand, Through an Editorial Lens
about.bio_1: My foundation in fashion and editorial photography gave me an obsession with lighting, styling, and visual narratives.
about.bio_2: Now, I bring that rigorous eye to the commercial world. Operating between the industrial power of Monterrey and the vibrant market of Houston,
about.bio_3: I partner with ambitious brands to replace generic corporate imagery with artful, magazine-quality storytelling.

t1.quote: "Andrea's ability to capture the essence of our hotel transformed our visual identity. The images she delivered exceeded every expectation and have driven a measurable increase in bookings."
t1.name: María González
t1.title: Director of Marketing, Grand Hotel Monterrey

t2.quote: "Working with Andrea felt like collaborating with a creative director, not just a photographer. She understood our brand before we could even articulate it ourselves."
t2.name: Carlos Mendoza
t2.title: Founder, Lumière Restaurant Group

t3.quote: "The editorial quality Andrea brings to commercial work is unmatched. Our properties have never looked this good — her eye for composition and light is extraordinary."
t3.name: Sarah Chen
t3.title: VP Creative, Prestige Real Estate Houston

posts.title: How Professional Photography Increases Hotel Booking Rates
posts.excerpt: Discover the measurable impact that elevated visual content has on hotel conversion rates and guest experience expectations.

posts.title: 5 Things to Know Before Hiring a Real Estate Photographer
posts.excerpt: From timing and staging to deliverables and licensing — everything you need to make the right choice for your property.

posts.title: The Art of Restaurant Visual Storytelling
posts.excerpt: How to capture the ambiance, culinary artistry, and brand personality of a restaurant through intentional photography.

blogPage.title: Photography Insights for Brands That Care About Image
blogPage.intro: A curated journal covering hospitality, restaurants, real estate, and brand campaigns through Andrea Palacio's editorial lens. Built to attract search visibility while still feeling unmistakably premium.
blogPage.featured_title: A sharper point of view for hospitality, food, property, and brand storytelling.
blogPage.featured_copy: This page gathers Andrea's latest articles in one refined destination, helping marketing teams, creative directors, and founders discover visual strategy insights that feel as elevated as the brand itself.
blogPage.all_title: Every article, organized in one editorial archive
blogPage.all_subtitle: Each piece is written to help decision-makers understand how premium photography shapes perception, conversion, and long-term brand value.
blogPage.explore_title: Topics shaped around modern brand visibility
blogPage.explore_subtitle: The archive is intentionally focused on the sectors where editorial-quality photography has the clearest commercial impact.
blogPage.explore_1_copy: Strategies for hotels, resorts, and boutique properties that need imagery aligned with luxury positioning and booking performance.
blogPage.explore_2_copy: Editorial guidance for restaurants, food brands, and chef-led concepts that want stronger visual identity and appetite appeal.
blogPage.explore_3_copy: Insights for developers, architects, and modern brands looking to elevate perception through polished, atmospheric photography.
